message:
fix: update tests for Arc-wrapped TensorStorage API and use meta() for shape queries

Follow-up fixes after the Arc-backed storage migration:

ft-autograd tests:
- Replace direct Vec comparison (data == &[...]) with data.as_slice()
  comparisons in f32 leaf and f32 sum tests, since TensorStorage::F32 now
  wraps Arc<Vec<f32>> rather than bare Vec<f32>
- Replace tape.shape(id) calls with tape.tensor(id).unwrap().meta().shape()
  in view tests (view_same_shape, view_flatten, view_unflatten) to use the
  canonical shape access path through TensorMeta

ft-core tests:
- Add missing `use std::sync::Arc` import needed by test constructors that
  now require Arc::new() wrapping for TensorStorage variants

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
